calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:06 am and concluding at 10:09 am.

Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Ins. Co. is represented by Tristan Espinosa, Esq., via zoom video conference.
Defendant Roshon Murray is not present.

The Court finds that Plaintiff has no standing to bring the motion for entery of default judgment.

The Court Orders the matter Dismissed with prejudice. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-04-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Roshon Antoinette Murray.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:34:36 a.m. and concluding at 9:51:01 a.m. (D505)

Tristan Espinosa, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Ins. Co.
Defendant Roshon Antoinette Murray not appearing.

The Court discusses the issues with counsel.
Counsel provides argument and offers a statement.

The Court denies the request to renew a judgment and continues the matter for plaintiff cure issues.

Plaintiff is to file a motion/brief which outlines the cause of action direct action of the judgment.

The Court requires witness appearance.

The matter is continued to November 20, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Continued To Oct-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
